news.title: M5Stack Introduces Stamp-P4 Development Board
news.summary: M5Stack has introduced the Stamp-P4, a tiny USB-C development board built around the ESP32-P4 high-performance RISC-V MCU chip.
news.content: M5Stack's new Stamp-P4 development board is equipped with 16MB of flash memory and supports Wi-Fi and Bluetooth 5.0. It is designed for developers looking to create compact and powerful IoT devices.

news.title: Apple Confirms WWDC 2026 with AI and iOS Updates
news.summary: Apple has confirmed that WWDC 2026 will run from June 8 to 12, with AI updates and iOS 27 headlining the keynote.
news.content: Apple's annual Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) will feature major updates to its AI capabilities and the release of iOS 27. Developers and tech enthusiasts anticipate improvements in Siri and potential AI integrations across Apple's ecosystem.

news.title: Australian-made AI Detects Breast Cancer Risk
news.summary: A new Australian artificial intelligence tool could transform breast cancer screening by offering a more personalized and accurate approach.
news.content: Developed by a team of Australian researchers, this AI tool is designed to analyze mammograms with higher accuracy than traditional methods, potentially reducing the number of missed diagnoses and improving patient outcomes.

news.title: ASRock Industrial Announces AI BOX-A395 System
news.summary: ASRock Industrial has announced the AI BOX-A395, a compact system based on the AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 platform, integrating CPU, GPU, and NPU resources.
news.content: The AI BOX-A395 is designed for high-performance desktop workloads, particularly in AI and machine learning applications. It targets developers and businesses looking for a powerful yet compact solution for their AI needs.

news.title: Rokid Launches New AR Glasses for Enterprise Use
news.summary: Rokid, a leading AR glasses manufacturer, has launched its latest model tailored for enterprise use, featuring enhanced AI capabilities.
news.content: Rokid's new AR glasses are designed to improve workplace efficiency through hands-free operation and advanced AI integration. The glasses offer features such as real-time data visualization and voice command functionality, making them suitable for various industrial applications.

news.title: Zephyr RTOS Reaches Major Milestone with 2.0 Release
news.summary: The Zephyr project has announced the release of Zephyr RTOS 2.0, marking a significant update to the popular real-time operating system.
news.content: Zephyr RTOS 2.0 introduces new features such as improved security, better modularity, and expanded hardware support. The update aims to cater to the growing needs of IoT and embedded systems developers, providing a robust platform for building reliable and secure applications.

news.title: Tuya Smart Launches New AI Platform for Home Automation
news.summary: Tuya Smart, a leading IoT platform, has launched a new AI platform designed to enhance home automation experiences.
news.content: The new AI platform from Tuya Smart offers advanced features such as voice control, facial recognition, and smart scene creation, aiming to provide a more personalized and intuitive smart home experience for users.

news.title: Elon Musk's Terafab Project Aims for AI Compute Power in Space
news.summary: Elon Musk has revealed plans for the Terafab project, a collaboration with SpaceX and xAI, aiming to unlock a terawatt of AI computing power in space.
news.content: The Terafab project is an ambitious initiative that seeks to harness the power of AI in space, potentially revolutionizing space exploration and satellite communications. This project highlights the growing interest in space-based AI applications and the race for computational supremacy.
